completeness.bounded_by: quest-domain completion goals; member_count goals (music/diary/clog cape) arrive with their feeder domains
completeness.known_missing_note: The Quest cape IS the QP cape — one node. Other completion goals are deferred to their domains.

records.name: Quest point cape
records.note: thresholds = total QP required for the cape; sourced from https://oldschool.runescape.wiki/w/Quest_point_cape (accessed 2026-06-22). OSRS is a living game — verify against the wiki after new quest releases.
